lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

barRaise.topFinding: M6 closed cleanly and the project is anchored at 100 percent complete. v0.14.0 (2b18093, Jun 28) shipped savings goals and CSV bank-format auto-detect without breaking a locked decision: the new /api/goals POST and PATCH boundaries run every money input through guardCents with sign validation (server.ts:980-987), so D-003 integer-cents holds on the new surface, and detectFormat ships with a dedicated test. The long-dominant .finances remote-history exposure is fully retired this cycle (repo delete-and-recreate purged the three pre-rewrite SHAs; gh api returns 422 / 404 and local git log --all -- .finances/* is empty), closing the MEDIUM that led the last eleven reviews. Working tree clean, stale index.lock gone, HEAD reconciled at fc5ad26, no HIGH findings for the twelfth straight cycle, no open BLOCK, all four hard-rule checks pass live. Verdict working at health 92.

deferred.title: Migrate the SQLCipher key off the archived keytar dependency.
deferred.reason: DECIDED keep 2026-06-25; gated on the build-failure trigger (act only if keytar fails to load/build on a supported Node LTS). Key is escrowed and injectable via YAB_DB_KEY without keytar.

deferred.title: Flip the Plaid connector from Sandbox to paid Production.
deferred.reason: Gated on external paid Plaid Production approval (D-012); kept a deliberate, documented budget decision.
